assignBiker.title: Assign Biker
assignBiker.hint: Only bikers currently on duty will be shown here.

operations.title: Management
operations.autoAcceptSub: Orders will be accepted automatically without sending an approval request to you

actions.suspendSub: Temporarily stop the biker from receiving orders
actions.deactivateSub: Deactivate account — biker won't be able to log in

support.title: Support
support.subject: Subject
support.successMsg: Your message was sent successfully, we'll be in touch soon

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: May 2025 — Please read these terms carefully before using the app.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By using the Tamam app, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree to any of these terms, please stop using the app immediately. The company reserves the right to modify these terms at any time with prior notice.

sections.title: Services Provided
sections.body: The Tamam app provides a platform connecting car wash owners with customers. Services include: order management, biker tracking, branch and staff management, and payment records. The company is not responsible for any disputes arising between service providers and customers.

sections.title: Privacy & Data Protection
sections.body: We are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection regulations. Your data is stored securely and will not be shared with any third party without your consent, except as required by law.

sections.title: Payments & Invoices
sections.body: All amounts shown are in Saudi Riyals and include VAT. The company may adjust subscription prices with at least 30 days advance notice. Fees paid for expired periods are non-refundable.

sections.title: Service Provider Obligations
sections.body: The service provider is committed to delivering agreed services at high quality, adhering to specified working hours, not sharing customer data with any other party, and immediately reporting any issue affecting service delivery.

sections.title: Service Termination
sections.body: Either party may terminate the agreement with 14 days advance notice. The company reserves the right to immediately suspend an account in case of violation of any of these terms or proven fraudulent practices.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.body: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of Saudi Arabia. Saudi courts have jurisdiction over any dispute arising from the application of these terms, with competent courts located in Riyadh.

auth.tagline: Log in and manage your customer services in Swivo — your personal guide to car washing delivered to your door!
auth.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

otp.title: Verify Account
otp.subtitle: Please enter the verification code sent to your registered mailbox

home.hint: Tap the button above to change your status and start receiving orders.
home.offlineSub: Press the button above to start receiving orders

ASSIGNED.title: Ready to start?
ASSIGNED.desc: When ready, tap "On My Way" to notify the customer and head to the location.

ON_THE_WAY.title: Arrived at customer location?
ON_THE_WAY.desc: Verify the car details and tap "Start Wash" when ready.

ARRIVED.title: Let's start washing now
ARRIVED.desc: Make sure all washing tools are ready, then begin immediately.

STARTED.title: Washing the car ✨
STARTED.desc: Ensure quality and cleanliness. Then tap "Finish Wash".

COMPLETED.title: Order Complete ✨
COMPLETED.desc: Service finished successfully. Please send the wash results to the customer.

camera.permissionMsg: The app needs camera permission to capture proof photos
camera.beforeHint: Capture car photos before starting — at least 1 required
camera.afterHint: Capture car photos after finishing — at least 1 required
camera.skipBody: You must provide a reason for skipping photos to continue

cancel.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? This action cannot be undone.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.footer: For inquiries about any clause, contact the support team

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By using the Tamam Biker app, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you disagree with any part, you are not permitted to use the app.

sections.title: 2. Nature of Service
sections.body: Tamam Biker is a platform connecting car wash service providers with customers. As an independent biker, you are not an employee of Tamam and bear responsibility for the quality and safety of service delivery.

sections.title: 3. Earnings & Payments
sections.body: Your earnings are calculated at 90% of each completed order's value. Withdrawal requests are processed within two business days. Tamam reserves the right to adjust commission rates with prior notice.

sections.title: 4. Professional Obligations
sections.body: The biker must arrive on time, use appropriate equipment, protect customer property, and act professionally at all times.

sections.title: 5. Order Cancellations
sections.body: Cancellations are only permitted in exceptional cases. Repeated cancellations may affect your rating and could result in account suspension.

sections.title: 6. Privacy & Data Protection
sections.body: We are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with our adopted privacy policy. Your data will not be shared with third parties except with your consent or as required by law.

sections.title: 7. Account Termination
sections.body: Tamam has the right to suspend or terminate your account in case of a violation of these terms. You have the right to close your account at any time by contacting technical support.
